subtitle: Haiti's Safe Ride & Delivery

description.en-US:
MsouWout is Haiti's trusted ride-hailing and delivery service. Get safe, reliable rides across Port-au-Prince and beyond with GPS tracking, verified drivers, and transparent pricing.

Key Features:
- Request rides instantly (Moto or Car)
- Real-time GPS tracking with live driver location
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
- Verified and vetted drivers
- A/C option for car rides
- Medical protection (DASH partnership)
- In-app messaging with your driver
- Emergency SOS button
- Zone-based safety system
- Logistics & freight delivery
- Available in Kreyol, French, English, and Spanish

MsouWout puts your safety first. Every driver is verified, every ride is tracked, and every trip is protected. Download now and experience the difference.
description.fr-FR:
MsouWout est le service de transport et de livraison de confiance en Haiti. Obtenez des trajets surs et fiables a travers Port-au-Prince et au-dela avec suivi GPS, chauffeurs verifies et tarification transparente.

Caracteristiques principales:
- Demandez des trajets instantanement (Moto ou Voiture)
- Suivi GPS en temps reel
- Tarification transparente sans frais caches
- Chauffeurs verifies
- Option climatisation pour les voitures
- Protection medicale (partenariat DASH)
- Messagerie integree avec votre chauffeur
- Bouton SOS d'urgence
- Systeme de securite par zones
- Logistique et livraison de fret
- Disponible en Kreyol, Francais, Anglais et Espagnol

screenshots_scenes: Home screen with ride request form
Vehicle selection (Moto vs Car with A/C toggle)
Live tracking with driver on map

permissions_usage_descriptions.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MsouWout needs your location to find rides near you and show your pickup point to drivers.
permissions_usage_descriptions.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MsouWout uses your location to track your ride in real-time and ensure driver safety.
permissions_usage_descriptions.NSCameraUsageDescription: MsouWout needs camera access for driver vehicle condition photos during registration.
permissions_usage_descriptions.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MsouWout needs microphone access for vehicle condition video uploads during driver registration.
permissions_usage_descriptions.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MsouWout needs photo library access to upload driver documents and vehicle photos.
